source_pr.title: ddl: fix unstable test in the TestDomain
source_pr.body:

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

Documentation

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky around DDL/schema changes where schema propagation is asynchronous. This PR stabilizes it by: ddl: fix unstable test in the TestDomain.
